title: Crispy Vegetable Skewers with Portuguese Spice
description: A flavorful and crispy vegetable skewer recipe infused with the bold flavors of Portuguese spice. Perfect for a quick and easy dinner or snack.

ingredients.name: Vegetables (color bell peppers, zucchini, onions, cherry tomatoes)

instructions: In a small bowl, mix together Portuguese Spice Mix and olive oil.
Brush the spice mixture onto the vegetables.
Grill skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally.
Serve skewers hot with crumbled crusty bread and a squeeze of lemon juice.
Optional: serve with a side of Portuguese rice or salad.
